intro.title: Explore the world of dinosaurs
intro.subtitle: Discover ancient creatures through interactive maps, 3D models and fascinating facts.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.subtitle: DinoTerra is your main resource for learning about dinosaurs. Dive into our interactive encyclopedia, explore the ancient world through detailed maps, and discover the fascinating history of each species. Whether you are a student, teacher, or dinosaur enthusiast, our platform offers a unique immersive experience.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: At DinoTerra, we aim to spark curiosity and deepen the understanding of the prehistoric world. By combining scientific accuracy with cutting-edge technology, we create an educational space for everyone.

why.title: Why Us?
why.text:
Engage with interactive maps, 3D models, and dynamic timelines.
Access detailed species profiles and discover fascinating historical contexts.
Content designed for students, educators, and enthusiasts.

features.title: Features
features.text:
Learn about dinosaurs like never before with detailed species profiles and immersive visualizations.
Travel across the map to explore dinosaur discovery sites in different regions.
Follow the timeline of dinosaurs from their emergence to extinction.

history.title: Our History
history.text: DinoTerra was born from a love of dinosaurs and a desire to share this passion with the world. What started as a simple idea has grown into a platform designed to make learning about dinosaurs accessible, interactive, and engaging for everyone.

recs.title: Recommended Dinosaurs
recs.subtitle: Discover some of the most iconic and fascinating dinosaurs in our collection.
